_comment: Scenario 2: HD-Map Obstacle Avoidance — D* Lite planner through pre-mapped obstacle field with full perception+radar stack. Compare with scenario 18 which has no HD-map and relies entirely on runtime perception.

scenario.name: obstacle_avoidance
scenario.description: Navigate through a 4-obstacle field using D* Lite planner with HD-map static obstacles. Full perception stack (color_contour + ByteTrack + UKF radar fusion) runs in parallel to confirm/refresh HD-map entries and detect unexpected obstacles. Path-aware ObstacleAvoider3D provides lateral nudge. Validates HD-map + perception cooperation.

obstacle_avoidance._comment: D* Lite is primary avoidance. Avoider is safety net: 8m influence, 1.5 max correction (100% of cruise), gain=3.0.
obstacle_avoidance._comment_706: Issue #706 — turn OFF the scenario-33 safety nets so this Gazebo scenario runs with legacy main-branch avoider behaviour for empirical comparison.

occupancy_grid._comment: 2m grid, 2m inflation, 1.0s TTL. promotion_hits=8: filters transient detections (0.4s at 20Hz) before promoting to static. HD-map suppression (Issue #389) prevents duplicating cells near pre-mapped obstacles. max_static_cells=800 safety cap. prediction_enabled=false: camera-depth noise makes velocity extrapolation unreliable (Issue #340), and HD-map already provides obstacle positions.

mission_planner._comment_static_obstacles: HD-map matching the 4 physical obstacles in test_world.sdf. Camera+radar detections confirm these at runtime.

geofence._comment: Geofence disabled — D* Lite replanning may push drone toward boundary when avoiding obstacles

waypoints._comment: Fly north — RED(3,15) 10.6m away. Wide margin for promoted cells.
Fly east — clear corridor north of obstacles. Payload trigger.
Return home — ORANGE(5,3) 5.8m away, outside promotion zone.

mission_planner._comment_waypoints: 5 waypoints routing near all 4 obstacles. Navigation WPs >8m from obstacle centres to account for HD-map footprint (4m) + runtime promoted cells (2-4m). Home WP (0,0) is 5.8m from ORANGE — acceptable since drone is landing.

tracker._comment: ByteTrack two-stage association for robust obstacle tracking

radar._comment: Radar enabled — HAL ground filter at 2.0m AGL rejects noise-elevated ground returns (Issue #340)
Camera+radar UKF fusion with ground filter + altitude gate

path_a._comment_706: Issue #706 — explicitly disable PR #647 voxel-snapshot append for legacy main-parity. PATH A is already disabled by default in this scenario (color_contour detector, no SAM), so this is documentation more than functional change.
